envelope.title: A Sweet Hello
envelope.subtitle: (just checking if the website logic works)

content.title: A Sweet Hello
paragraphs: I was just sitting here, doing absolutely nothing important, and then a cute little baby "requested" me to write letters to her. Aww... How cute. That You RIGHT ?!

I don't know if you realize how often that happens. How a random song, a colour, a quiet moment in the evening, will quietly remind me that you exist. But How Ironic that we live miles apart! sending you an actual letter will take weeks so for now I made you this. (*With Love*)

I know lavender is your color, So I used the shades of purple to give you the feel of lavenders. I also added a Vlog and Audio Log section (I just added them cause you never know if you'll use them hehe). Ohhh yeah... almost forgot look at the bottom right corner. I made you a Music Player system too so that at least the music will save you from my boring letters. 🤭
I'm not writing this because I need an answer to anything. I'm just fulfilling the "*request*".
No pressure, no rush, no expectations. Just a small note to say: *hello, How are you ?*🌸
content.name: Sunflower 🌻

envelope.title: Somewhere Between Us 💫
envelope.subtitle: Not just friends… not quite lovers… but something that feels right 💖

content.title: A Little Confession Wrapped in Smiles ✨
paragraphs: I don’t really know what to call us yet… but I know that whatever this is, it makes my days softer and my nights a little brighter
It’s funny how we started so casually, just talking, laughing, sharing random little things… and now somehow, you’ve become someone I look forward to every single day
There’s this comfort in you… like I don’t have to pretend, don’t have to try too hard. I can just be me—and somehow, that feels enough when I’m with you 🤍
Maybe we’re not labeling it yet, maybe we’re just floating somewhere in between… but I won’t lie—I really, really like being here with you 🫶
And if this “in-between” slowly turns into something more someday… I think I’d like that a lot 🌸
content.signOff: Always a little more yours than I admit 🌼
content.name: Sunflower 🌻

envelope.title: A Letter That Traveled Miles Just for You
envelope.subtitle: Because distance can’t stop something this soft 💫

content.title: If This Reaches You, Smile a Little 😊
paragraphs: If this were a real letter, it would probably be a little crumpled from the journey, maybe carrying a faint scent of something familiar… and definitely filled with pieces of me in every word 💌✨
But even like this, through a screen, I hope you can still feel it—the way I paused before writing your name, the way I smiled without realizing, the way you quietly took over my thoughts again 💭💗
I think what we have is kind of special… not loud, not rushed, just slowly growing in its own calm, beautiful way 🌱🤍
Sometimes I wonder… if we were in the same place, would I be handing you this letter shyly? Or teasing you while you read it? Maybe both 😌✨
Until that day comes, I’ll keep sending you these little pieces of me… words pretending to be paper, feelings pretending to be ink 🖋️💞
So whenever you read this, just know—somewhere, someone is thinking of you a little too much and smiling like an idiot because of it 😄💘
Don't worry... This idiot will share more letters with you soooon!!!!!!
content.signOff: Folded with care and a little bit of you in every line 💭
content.name: Sunflower 🌻
